mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password_hash, display_name, employee_id, email, is_active, failed_login_count FROM users WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT r.code FROM user_roles ur JOIN roles r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.is_active = TRUE ORDER BY r.id

SELECT DISTINCT m.id, m.code, m.name, m.parent_id, m.path, m.icon, m.menu_type, m.sort_order, m.is_active, m.depth FROM role_menus rm JOIN menus m ON m.id = rm.menu_id JOIN user_roles ur ON ur.role_id = rm.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.is_active = TRUE ORDER BY m.depth, m.sort_order, m.id
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET failed_login_count = failed_login_count + 1, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET failed_login_count = 0, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET last_login_at = now(), updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{userId}
